creator: kick.christoph@googlemail.com
text:
Looks nice to me, thank you for patching it ;-)

Am 06.06.2010 03:21 schrieb "Edwin Groothuis" <edwin@freebsd.org>:

Maintainer of devel/rubygem-rubygame,

Please note that PR ports/147527 has just been submitted.

If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
and a committer will take care of it.

The full text of the PR can be found at:
   http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/147527

--
Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
edwin@FreeBSD.org
